notes: v2.4.23 - Non-Conformance: editing a CAPA opens normally again instead of a blank/frozen screen; the NCRs, CAPAs, and Analytics tabs now scroll all the way to the bottom on any screen size or zoom; the NCRs, Risks, CAPAs, and Analytics tabs share a consistent look (KPI tiles, card sizes, toolbars) so switching between them is smooth, and NCR cards line up field-for-field; the CAPA edit window shows the action type and status as clean color-coded chips. Photos & documents: fixed an issue where uploading a same-named image (e.g. Image.jpg) to one NCR could overwrite another NCR's photo in the same project (same fix applied to AS9100 certificate uploads). Operations Intelligence: new builds default the Travelers option to ON. Exports: exporting a CAPA list now confirms the download, gives each file a unique name, and blocks accidental rapid re-clicks so you no longer get piles of duplicate exports. Planner: the 'Roadblock' status was renamed to 'Waiting on Outsource'.
